name: obsidian-codex-memory
description: Read and update Codex memory notes in the user's Obsidian vault.

interface.shortDescription: Use Obsidian as Codex long-term memory.
interface.longDescription: Reads the Codex memory note in the configured Obsidian vault, appends compact session summaries, and can selectively sync memory files to GitHub.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use my Obsidian memory before answering, then update the Codex session summary when the task is complete.
